_comment: COMBINED streaming test — Node 1 (worker). Run on 10.10.1.1.
_comment2: One StreamPipeline does per-round rdma_recv (input) + full pipeline + per-round
_comment3: rdma_send (Mode-2 return). TWO middle stages run with per-stage WIDTH:2 (host
_comment4: scatter/gather across private sub-slots) — composed with cross-node RDMA. Boundary
_comment5: stages (rotate reads the rdma_recv slot; export feeds the rdma_send) stay width 1.
